Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to produce event log table We have orders order lines deliveries invoices payments We need to map events Order Created from Orders Items Picked maybe per line or aggregated Order Dispatched delivery dispatch date Order Arrived delivery arrival date Invoice Issued Payment Received

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Also we can include resource actor sales person for order created picker for items picked carrier for dispatch arrival maybe resource is carrier id billing person for invoice payment method maybe as attribute

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: When multiple timestamps are available produce one event per activity if meaningful or summarize if appropriate Since picking multiple items at different times but same order we could create separate Item Picked events with item details and picker id

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: For order 1001 Order Created at 2024 01 01T09 00 00Z then item picked ITEM 001 quantity 2 at 2024 01 02T10 15 00Z then item picked ITEM 002 quantity 1 at 2024 01 02T11 00 00Z then delivery dispatched then arrived then invoice issued then payment received

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order1002 events Order Created Jan2 12 30 Item picked ITEM003 qty4 Jan3 09 45 Item picked ITEM005 qty2 Jan3 10 00 Delivery split into two shipments with dispatch and arrival events Invoice issues two invoices and two payments

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order1003 Created Jan3 10 00 two item picks on Jan5 then one delivery dispatch and arrival then one invoice then one payment

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Order1005 Created Jan5 08 45 two item picks on Jan6 then one delivery dispatch and arrival then one invoice then one payment

Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Order 1004 has order creation and one item picking event but no delivery no invoice and no payment records

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We need chronological order per case For each order_id we list events sorted by timestamp

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: We can include resource or actor and other attributes such as item id quantity invoice amount and payment reference

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: Define columns Case ID Activity Name Timestamp Actor Resource and attributes like item id quantity carrier invoice amount payment method payment reference

Name: Validation - PE
Text: We will sort globally ascending timestamp because each event has a timestamp and this preserves chronology across cases while also maintaining correct order within each case
